response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced senior software engineer, but their background is almost exclusively in web, backend, and application-level software development. The resume shows a complete lack of experience in the core requirements of this role, such as SoC/IP modeling, hardware performance architecture, AI accelerator optimization, and hardware-software co-design. The skills and experience are fundamentally misaligned with the position.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior/staff level software engineer.
Experience with performance-oriented languages like Dlang and C++.
Demonstrated ability to work on low-latency, high-throughput systems, albeit in a web context.
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture design.
No demonstrated experience in analyzing or optimizing deep-learning workloads on hardware.
Background is heavily focused on software (web, backend, mobile) rather than the required hardware/systems level.
